_note: Trigger-quality eval set. Run later via skill-creator's description-optimization loop. should_trigger=true means this skill should activate; should_trigger=false means a near-miss that should NOT trigger (other skills like deep-research should handle it).

evals.prompt: I want to figure out whether it's actually worth it for my startup to fine-tune our own model vs just keep wrapping GPT-4o. Need a real assessment, not a vibes call. Money is tight.
Run a deep evaluation on the ROI of doing RLHF on open-source models for a vertical SaaS. I want hypotheses tested, peer-reviewed sources, and a verdict on whether there's a sweet spot.
we keep going back and forth on this internally — is fine-tuning a llama 3 70B for our domain a strategic moat or a money pit? need a structured research project, not a one-pager
Use the rl-finetune-roi-research skill but swap the topic to: ROI of building proprietary RAG infrastructure vs using a managed vector DB. Same workflow, different subject.

I need a multi-phase research project on whether parameter-efficient fine-tuning (LoRA, QLoRA) actually moves the needle economically for B2B AI products. Adversarial review and verified citations matter.
Decision-criteria research: when does it pay off to invest in domain RL on a foundation model? I want hypotheses, deep dives, and an academic-grade output with a final PDF.
Board is asking for a position paper on whether we should keep our fine-tuning team or shut it down. Want the full structured research treatment with adversarial review.
Help me identify the sweet spot — minimum fine-tuning investment for maximum reasoning gains on our domain. Need peer-reviewed evidence, not blog posts.
Can you research the latest LoRA techniques and summarize the main approaches? Just a quick overview for a slack post.
Find me the top 5 recent papers on RLHF from NeurIPS 2024 and give me the abstracts.
What's a reasonable hourly rate for a contractor to fine-tune an open-source model? Just need a market range.
I need to fine-tune a llama model for a customer support classifier. Walk me through the steps.
Can you do some research on what AI21 Labs did wrong before they shut down their consumer products?
Look up GCP Vertex AI fine-tuning pricing and tell me what it would cost to fine-tune Gemini for our use case.
Write a competitive analysis of OpenAI vs Anthropic vs Google for enterprise AI deals.
Research the impact of GPU shortages on AI startup margins.
Help me debug why my QLoRA fine-tune is OOM-ing on an A100.
Summarize the Chinchilla scaling paper for me.
do that big multi-phase research thing on whether owning your model actually pays off — the one with the hypotheses A through G, parallel agents, adversarial pass, all of it
I'm thinking about RLHF for our chatbot. What's the gist of how it works under the hood?
